title: Crooked Crooks
description: Adds its own take on crooks. They multiply drops from leaves and grass, herd sheep and pull mobs!
body:
![Banner for the Crooked Crooks mod](https://mod-assets.upcraft.dev/promo/crooked-crooks/modpage_banner.png)
Crooked Crooks is a mod that adds its own take on a classic from Ex Nihilo (and its many successors): the crook! Our crooks not only has the classic property of multiplying drops from leaves, but also applies it to grass, has the ability to pull mobs, and also herds sheep! A wooden crook can be crafted with four sticks in a crafting table as shown in the image below:
![The recipe for a Wooden Crook](https://mod-assets.upcraft.dev/promo/crooked-crooks/modpage_crafting.png?a)
With that same template, you can also craft stone crooks with cobblestone, bone crooks with bones, and iron crooks with iron ingots! The exact recipes can be seen on [the gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/crooked-crooks/gallery). ## Dependencies As of 1.21.4, this mod requires only the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) to be installed. As for the loader, the Fabric Loader, as well as the [Quilt Loader](https://quiltmc.org), are available. As of Crooked Crooks 4.0.0, this mod is fully compatible with NeoForge with no extra dependencies. ## Configuration Currently, this mod has one config option that allows for disabling the Shepherd's Touch effect (and sheep herding as a consequence). It may be disabled by dragging and drop the `shepherds_touch.txt` file to the `disabled` folder inside of the `.minecraft/config/crooked_crooks` folder. A demonstration of the config system may be seen on [this video](https://mod-assets.upcraft.dev/promo/crooked-crooks/config_showcase.mp4). Besides that, it is possible to customize which blocks should have their drops multiplied by a crook through either the `#crooked_crooks:multiplies_drops` block tag (Fabric, always multiplies by 3) or through the `crooked_crooks:multiplies_drops` [data map](https://docs.neoforged.net/docs/resources/server/datamaps/) (NeoForge, custom multiplier). The block tag used to determine which blocks are breakable by the crook is `#crooked_crooks:mineable_with_crook`. ## Attribution This mod's icon makes usage of [Twemoji](https://github.com/jdecked/twemoji) assets, which are licensed under [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
